articles.title: Samsung Galaxy Book 6 Edge Launched as Firm's First Snapdragon X2 Elite PC
articles.description: Samsung Galaxy Book 6 Edge was launched on Monday. It is the South Korean tech conglomerate's first laptop powered by Qualcomm's new Snapdragon X2 Elite platform. The laptop sports a 16-inch...

articles.title: iQube and Orbiter Power TVS Past 10 Lakh Electric Scooter Sales Mark
articles.description: TVS Motor Company has surpassed 10 lakh electric scooter sales in India, achieving this milestone with a rapid increase in sales over the past 16 months. Here's how iQube and Orbiter were important contributors.

articles.title: The new Sharp Aquos R11 gains a 38.5MP tele camera, Snapdragon 8s Gen 4 chipset
articles.description: Sony barely bothers to make phones anymore, but there is another Japanese company that routinely comes out with new models – meet the Sharp Aquos R11. A sequel to the Aquos R10, this phone adds a telephoto camera, upgrades to a higher tier chipset, offers a mixed bag of display and camera improvements and removes the microSD slot. Okay, that sentence started strong, but didn’t end on a high note. The R11 has a 6.5” Pro IGZO OLED display (1,080 x 2,340px resolution) with 1-240Hz refresh rate. With 3,600 nits peak brightness, it is the brightest display on an Aquos phone yet, beating the R10...

articles.title: Apple @ Work Podcast: Leebry aims to unify your SaaS tools for AI use
articles.description: Apple @ Work is exclusively brought to you by Mosyle , the only Apple Unified Platform. Mosyle is the only solution that integrates in a single professional-grade platform all the solutions necessary to seamlessly and automatically deploy, manage & protect Apple devices at work. Over 45,000 organizations trust Mosyle to make millions of Apple devices work-ready with no effort and at an affordable cost. Request your EXTENDED TRIAL today and understand why Mosyle is everything you need to work with Apple . In this episode of Apple @ Work, Dan Jaenicke, Director of B2B Product Strategy at MacPaw, joins the show to talk about Leebry .

articles.title: Study identifies 60 workplace skills that AI may struggle to replace
articles.description: As artificial intelligence transforms workplaces around the world, a new study suggests some of the most valuable skills of the future may have little to do with coding or data. Leadership, teamwork and negotiation emerged among the abilities least likely to be overtaken by machines.

articles.title: John Crane introduces industry-first methodology to improve drivetrain accuracy and reduce failure risk
articles.description: John Crane, a global leader in flow control technologies and a business of Smiths Group plc, has developed an industry-first validated methodology that significantly improves the accuracy of drivetrain analysis in critical rotating equipment. The breakthrough approach reduces predictive variance, helping operators reduce failure risk, improve reliability and gain greater confidence in system performance before [...] The post John Crane introduces industry-first methodology to improve drivetrain accuracy and reduce failure risk appeared first on FM Live .

articles.title: When Sundar Pichai cracked an 'AI' joke during his Stanford University speech: Difficult to not talk about AI because my name...
articles.description: Stanford graduates received unexpected advice from Google CEO Sundar Pichai, who intentionally omitted AI from his commencement speech. He emphasized that timeless wisdom is technology-agnostic, focusing instead on personal choices and building a fulfilling life. Pichai shared his three guiding principles: optimism, tackling challenges, and pursuing passions, to help graduates navigate life's pressures.

articles.description: A Bengaluru man’s X post went viral on social media, as he shared a picture of an auto rickshaw driver casually pulling his smartwatch in order to show him the QR code for payment.

articles.description: Honda Elevate facelift has been spotted testing in India, indicating an imminent launch, although no official date has been confirmed. The expected upgrades include a 360-degree camera, ventilated front seats and a larger touchscreen.

It is expected to arrive as the successor to the Vivo X Fold 5, which also debuted around the same time last year. Executives from the company have also shared details a...

articles.title: Hack of the day: Speed up your slow laptop and improve its performance
articles.description: Don't rush to replace your slow laptop; most performance issues stem from software. Address startup programs, uninstall unused apps, clear temporary files, and ensure all updates are installed. Adjusting power settings and ruling out malware can also significantly boost speed before considering hardware upgrades.

Just a few months after longtime Xbox head Phil Spencer left the company and former AI executive Asha Sharma was put in charge, the gaming world ...

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 wide may use thicker ultra-thin glass than Fold8 Ultra
articles.description: According to a report from last week, Samsung will use ultra-thin glass (UTG) of different thicknesses on the upcoming Galaxy Z Fold8 (wide) and Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra. Both foldables are expected to debut in July alongside the Galaxy Z Flip8. Ultra-thin glass forms the top protective layer of a foldable phone's flexible AMOLED display. It helps reduce the crease while protecting the screen from drops. According to the report, the Galaxy Z Fold8 (wide) will feature a 60μm-thick UTG. Leaked Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 (wide) render The taller Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra, on the other hand, is...

articles.title: Morgan Stanley becomes first major Wall Street bank to open trillion-dollar wealth management system to AI agents, says: ‘The way we see it...’
articles.description: Morgan Stanley is pioneering direct AI access to its trillion-dollar wealth management systems for corporate clients. This groundbreaking move allows autonomous AI agents to interact with stock administration platforms, bypassing traditional human interfaces. The bank anticipates this will significantly scale services like client onboarding and support, marking a major shift in how financial institutions engage with technology.

articles.title: Winning with AI: Prompting a skill to thrill
articles.description: AI skills are changing how we work. Instead of generic claims, skills are now specific AI instructions. This allows users to train AI assistants for repeated tasks. Think of them as mini-playbooks for your company. Creating effective skills requires defining exact outcomes, audience, and checks, writes Parminder Singh.

articles.title: Noise Diva Araya review: A glamorous smartwatch, but is it a pro or a con?
articles.description: The Noise Diva Araya brings much-needed style to the smartwatch segment with its premium design, comfortable fit and dependable battery life. However, the emphasis on glamour sometimes feels excessive, while connectivity hiccups and a frustrating companion app stop the experience from being as polished as the hardware.

articles.title: Starlink, Eutelsat-OneWeb, SES India under 'signal spillage' scrutiny from MHA
articles.description: Starlink's rivals, Eutelsat-OneWeb and SES, which partnered with India's Bharti Airtel and Reliance Jio, respectively, have also come under a wider review by the Ministry of Home Affairs (MHA) officials, according to the person who did not wish to be named.

articles.title: ‘Can’t COMPROMISE on safety!’: UK PM Starmer announces full SOCIAL MEDIA BAN for under-16 children
articles.description: The United Kingdom is preparing to introduce some of the world's toughest online safety measures for children. Prime Minister Keir Starmer has announced plans to ban social media access for children under the age of 16, saying there will be 'no compromise on safety.' The government is also considering overnight social media curfews and restrictions on infinite scrolling for users under 18.

articles.title: UK PM Starmer announces social media ban for under-16 users: Which platforms will be affected?
articles.description: The move comes amid mounting concerns over the impact of social media on children's health and safety.

articles.title: India, Italy to expand trilateral cooperation in Africa via AI Hub
articles.description: India and Italy will expand trilateral cooperation in Africa via an AI Hub for Sustainable Development and initiatives in precision agriculture, water, health, and education, said Italian Ambassador Antonio Bartoli, highlighting a growing partnership.

articles.title: SpaceX's Bullish Debut: Oppenheimer Sets $190 Target, Stock Soars
articles.description: Oppenheimer initiated coverage on SpaceX with a bullish outlook and a $190 price target. The company made a historic debut on Nasdaq, with its stock (SPCX) surging 19% to $161, achieving a valuation of over $2 trillion on its first day.

articles.title: WhatsApp Reportedly Begins Testing Group Voice and Video Calls for WhatsApp Web Users
articles.description: WhatsApp is reportedly rolling out group voice and video calling support on WhatsApp Web for selected beta testers. The feature allows users to start group calls directly from a browser and supports up to 32 participants. Users can choose specific participants, create call links, enable waiting rooms, and share their screens during video calls. Group calls remain prot...

articles.description: The feature allows motorists to start and pay for roadside parking through the ERP 2 on-board unit (OBU) display.
